titleStmt.title: SII 17.315: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 315. (A.R. No. 286 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 96 sheep by Śōḻaśikhāmaṇi-terinda valaṅgai vēḷaikkāṟar for a perpetual lamp to the god Tirukkāḷatti-mahādēva, for the merit of Śiṅgaṉ Kulamāṇikkaṉ, a soldier belonging to the Edirilichōḷa-terinda valaṅgaivēḷaikkāṟar of the śiṟudanam, who was killed in a feud with the Iḷaiyarāja-Uttamaterinda valaṅgai vēḷaikkāṟar, regiment and for the merit of Iḷaiyarāja-uttama-terinda valaṅgai vēḷaikkāṟār. The sheep were entrusted to the care of Māṟan Maṉagati, the maṉṟāḍi (shepherd) of Śivapādaśēkharamaṅgalam, the maḍaviḷāgam village of god Tirukkāḷatti Uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakesariypanmarāna śrīrā
jentra coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 4
tu ḷ 2 100 2 10 8 ciṟutanattu Etirili
coḻa terin=ta valaṅkai veḷaik
kāṟaril ciṅkaṉ kulamāṇikkaṉ ciṟu
tanattu Iḷaiyarāja Uttama
terinta valaṅkai veḷaikkāṟaro
ṭu vaḻakkāṭip paṭṭamaiyil paṭṭa ci
ṅkan kulamāṇikkattukku Ākavum
[iḷaiyarāja] Uttama terinta valaṅkai
veḷaikkāṟarkkākavum Ippaṭaikku
ciṟappāka ciṟutanattu coḻacikā
maṇiterin=ta valaṅkai veḷaikkāṟa
r jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
perumpāṇappāṭi tiruveṅkaṭak koṭṭat
tu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkāḷat
ti mahādevarkku cantrātittavaṟ Orutiruna
ntāviḷakku Erippatāka koṇ
ṭuvanta cāvāmuvāp perā
ṭu 9 10 6 Ivvarivāṭu toṇ
ṇūṟṟāṟum Ivarkaḷ koṇ
ṭuvantamaiyil Iṉṉāṭ
ṭu tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyān
maṭaviḷākamāṉa civapātace
karamaṅkalattu maṉṟāṭi mā
ṟaṉ maṉakati vacam Uṭaiyā
rkku tirunantāviḷakku 1- ṟukku
nicatam muḻakku neyya
ṭṭu kku
cāvāmuvāp perāṭu
[9 10 6 m] kaikkoṇṭu
Uṭaiyārkku cantrātittavar nica
tamuḻakku ney muṭṭāmai
Aṭṭuvaṉāṉeṉ maṉ
ṟāṭi māṟaṉ manakatiyeṉ
Itu panmāyeśvara ra
kṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.315 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
